title: Peripherals
description:
Peripherals

Peripherals

The Robot Controller has one RS-232C port as standard. Available ports can be added (up to 5 ports) by installing an optional RS-232C board. Refer to RS-232C Communications for details.

NOTE:  T series and VT series manipulator do not have RS-232C port on the controller. Optional RS-232C board cannot be added.

You can use TCP/IP to connect peripheral equipment. Refer to TCP/IP Communications for details.
